message:
chore(gitignore): ignore .ntm/ per-repo state directory

Add `.ntm/` to the repo .gitignore so the NTM agent-session manager's
per-repo state (rate-limit tracking under `.ntm/rate_limits.json` plus
any future session metadata files the manager lands there) stops
showing up as untracked in `git status` on every run.

The contents are regenerated on demand and have no business in
version control. This has been showing up across multiple commit-sweep
sessions as a stray untracked file — locking it out at the ignore
level means it is never proposed for commit again.

files.patch:
@@ -175,3 +175,6 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # Recovery build artifacts
 .target_cass_recovery/
+
+# NTM per-repo state (rate-limit tracking, session metadata) — regenerated on demand
+.ntm/
